title: Collapsible Travel Silicone Dog Cat Bowl Portable Pet Food Water Bowl, Feeding trough Portable Drinking Water Drinker with Water Hook, Easy to Carry, Save Space.（1 pcs）
features: ღ【SUPER DURABLE AND SAFE】: Made of 100% Premium silicone for food use, BPA-free, dishwasher safe and non-toxic. Soft texture, resistance to crushing and resistance to fall.
ღ【PORTABLE & CONVENIENT】: The dog bowl with a width of 13cm, a height of 5.5cm, can hold water up to 350ml or dog food of 1.5 cups. 1.3cm when folded. Simply Pop-Up and then folded.

ღ【EASY TO CLEAN】: Durable bowl silicone construction means it can be rinsed or cleaned after use. For proper hygiene, always wash animal products after each use to avoid cross-contamination and the spread of germs.

ღ【EASY TO USE】: opens and folds in a simple and flat way to easily store it with the clip hole. The included carabiners can be used to hook the bag or a single bowl to the backpack, leash or directly to the trousers.

ღ【MULTIPURPOSE】: an indispensable travel piece, a travel dog bowl designed for travel, used to hold water, dog food, snacks, etc. When not in use, the folding bowl can be used as a frisbee, and I think everyone likes to play frisbee with their dog.
description: This foldable pet travel bowl is made of 100% food safe silicone and a BPA-free plastic board. The foldable and lightweight design is perfect for the owner of animals who love walking, traveling, hiking with their pets. Includes 1 Practical quick release carabiner for attaching to the leash, backpack or stroller. You will love this bowl! The portable travel dog bowl is ready for any outdoor adventure. √ 100% Food Grade FDA approved and lead-free silicone for the whole family. √ Feed and hydrate your dog on the go. √ Easy to store in your backpack, pocket or storage compartment. √Easy to clean, dishwasher available. √ Excellent resistance and stability. √ Simply pop-up and then fold back. √ Great for traveling, hiking, camping or any outdoor activity with your pet. Specifications: Material: 100% food-grade silicone Color: Blue Upper diameter: 5.1 inches (13 cm) Base diameter: 3.5 inches (8.9 cm) Maximum height: 2.1 inches (5.4 cm) Fully collapsed: 0.5 inches (1.27 cm) THE PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 x Folding Bowl for Dog and Cat
